'''''Dagger''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] in use by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was used to transfer an Alliance team to secure the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Bixby]]'' during the ship's [[Battle in the Dellalt system|defection]] to the Rebellion.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
